lemmas.primary_translation: rope ladder / ship's ladder / sail cable

definitions.text: taustige med tretrinn, særlig til å henge utenbords på skip
definitions.translation: rope ladder with wooden rungs, especially for hanging over the side of a ship

definitions.text: fast stige eller trinnrekke for eksempel fra skipsdekk ned i lasterom
definitions.translation: fixed ladder or series of steps from a ship's deck down into the cargo hold

definitions.text: ståltau som et sneiseil løper på når det heises og hales ned
definitions.translation: steel cable on which a sail runs when it is hoisted and lowered
